what_it_does: Stores YAML-frontmatter metadata for a channel attachment that links the dragnet-development channel to a board item.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and an empty Markdown body.
It declares an attachment of type board_items.
The target is a board item referenced by the URI-like identifier board://item-9c12e8ec.
The file name is att-9089b539.md, matching the id field.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI-style scheme.
It functions as a join record between a channel and a board item rather than containing prose or code.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Leaves the Markdown body empty, treating the file as pure metadata.
concerns: The board:// scheme and the referenced item are not defined within this file.
There is no human-readable label, title, or reason for the attachment.
No author or provenance beyond the timestamp is recorded.
notes: This is a minimal, timestamped channel-to-board-item attachment record with no content beyond its linking metadata.
questions: What does the board:// URI scheme resolve to?
What is the semantic meaning of the board_items attachment type?
Who created this attachment and why?
Is the referenced board item still valid or current?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — no explicit purpose is stated; the fields imply it is an attachment record and the content matches that role.
apparent_themes: Cross-referencing artifacts across channels and boards.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, discoverable association between a channel and a specific board item.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to reference an external board item in otherwise minimal frontmatter.
contribution: A provenance-timestamped cross-reference between the dragnet-development channel and board item item-9c12e8ec.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment file named att-9089b539.md records that the dragnet-development channel has a board_items attachment pointing to board item item-9c12e8ec, created on 2026-06-24.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a link between a channel and a specific board item for later retrieval or context.
